Airfryer Companion · Legal

Airfryer Companion privacy policy

No data collected. No ads, no analytics, no account — your cooks stay on your device.

Last updated: June 12, 2026

Data we collect

Airfryer Companion collects no personal data. Recipes, favorites, timers and your My Cooks diary live only on your device.

Advertising

Airfryer Companion contains no advertising.

Analytics & tracking

No analytics or tracking SDKs are included.

Accounts

No account or sign-up is required.

Data storage

All data is stored locally on your iPhone. Deleting the app deletes your data.

Additional details

  • The Pro upgrade is a one-time purchase processed entirely by Apple through the App Store — we never see your payment details.
  • Timer notifications are local notifications scheduled on your device.
  • The app works fully offline.

Children’s privacy

Airfryer Companion does not collect personal data from anyone, including children. The app contains no social features, chat or user-generated content shared with others.

Changes to this policy

If a future version of Airfryer Companion changes how data is handled — for example by introducing new features — this policy will be updated before that version is released, and the date above will reflect it.

Contact

For privacy questions about Airfryer Companion, email support@amsterdamfuturelabs.com . Amsterdam Future Labs · Pieter Thurkow, Amsterdam, The Netherlands.
